arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the KMS key.

aws_account_id.description: The AWS account ID that owns the KMS key.

cloud_hsm_cluster_id.description: The ID of the CloudHSM cluster that contains the key.

creation_date.description: The date and time when the KMS key was created.

custom_key_store_id.description: The ID of the custom key store that contains the KMS key.

customer_master_key_spec.description: The cryptographic configuration of the KMS key.

deletion_date.description: The date and time when the KMS key is scheduled for deletion.

description.description: A brief description of the KMS key.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the KMS key is enabled.

expiration_model.description: The expiration model of the KMS key.

id.description: The unique identifier for the KMS key.

key_manager.description: The manager of the KMS key, which could be AWS or a customer.

key_spec.description: The cryptographic configuration of the KMS key.

key_state.description: The current state of the KMS key.

key_usage.description: The intended use of the KMS key.

multi_region.description: Indicates if the KMS key is multi-region.

multi_region_configuration.description: Configuration details for a multi-region KMS key.

origin.description: The source of the key material for the KMS key.

pending_deletion_window_in_days.description: The waiting period before the KMS key is deleted.

valid_to.description: The date and time when the KMS key will become invalid.

xks_key_configuration.description: Configuration details for the external key store (XKS) key.
